title: File columns visible for make.com

posts.author: Moeydc (Jon Moses)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good morning community,

does anyone know the best workaround for having make.com have visibility on file columns,

E.g. a picture is pasted into a file column in monday, a make automation needs to ‘see’ the picture and extract information.

I can get the entire automation to work but make says that it is unable to download or see any of the pictures in the file columns,

Appreciate any help on this one

posts.author: edarling85 (Wild 6 | Eric Darling)
posts.cookedHtml: You can do some of that w/ monday.coms Ai automations & there is a PDF app that I have used in the past integrated w/ Make and Monday.com to extract info as well.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Moeydc,

Can you give more details about exactly what you are seeing in Make?

Jim - The Monday Man

posts.author: edarling85 (Wild 6 | Eric Darling)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Jim we cam always hop on a 15min call if you want

posts.author: edarling85 (Wild 6 | Eric Darling)
posts.cookedHtml: I explain a litte more here in my Linkedin post - Upload a file into a file column and extract info from that file using Ai columns. Company, phone numbers, email, anything. Just get the prompt right for each data field you want to extract from then… | Eric Darling
